subcodes.first_line: The Book of Dawn hath appeared, and therein hath been inscribed by the Most Exalted Pen: sovereignty belongeth unto the Lord of all mankind, and verily it proclaimeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر کتاب الفجر و فیه رقم من القلم الاعلی الملک لمالک الوری و انه ینطق انه
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
